text:
year. 

SHORT NAME: EMER_MDCL_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 

LONG NAME: EMER_MDCL_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: This variable = 1 if PRVDR_CLSFCTN_SYS = “1” or “N” and the taxonomy code value is one of the 
following: 
146D00000X: Personal emergency response attendant 
146L00000X: Emergency medical technician, paramedic 
146M00000X: Emergency medical technician, intermediate 
146N00000X: Emergency medical
